_comment: nugget overlay hooks (Open-Plugins spec). Goose discovers this via ~/.agents/plugins/rockie-nugget/. Goose hooks are ADVISORY/non-blocking by design — this set captures durable memory at session end (Stop) and emits an installed-skills inventory at session start (SessionStart); neither ever gates a tool. NUGGET_OVERLAY_DIR resolves to the plugin dir whether run locally or on the platform.
